one_line_verdict: A gripping psychological drama for fans of slow-burn character studies — best saved for a quiet streaming night rather than a theater trip, unless you crave immersive sound design with your tension.
english_note: Straightforward dialogue-driven drama; no heavy accents, jargon, or dense cultural references.
credits_detail: No mid- or post-credits scene expected — this is a grounded drama with no franchise setup. (Speculative based on genre.)
one_line_summary: A haunting post-prison psychological thriller — freedom has never felt so terrifying.
